### Post by mIk3_08 on 2023-04-16
This will give us all the system information of your machine.
Please follow the instructions in the link below and paste the results here in pastebin Ubuntu. [Click here]("https://pastebin.ubuntu.com/")
[https://github.com/UbuntuForums/system-info](https://github.com/UbuntuForums/system-info)
Regards and cheers

---
